task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the GDPR Compliant Exam Config.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the SEB Server web interface showing an exam configuration named 'GDPR Compliant Exam Config' with the description 'GDPR Article 25 - data protection by design and by default' in a list or detail view.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Privacy-First Connection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a connection configuration named 'Privacy-First Connection'. The UI should indicate that the fallback option is disabled (e.g., a checkbox left unchecked or a status label).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the GDPR Exam Template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an exam template list or detail page in the SEB Server UI showing a template named 'GDPR Exam Template'.

task_completion.description: Verify the addition of the 'Minimal Monitoring' indicator to the template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Last Ping Time' monitoring indicator named 'Minimal Monitoring' within the template settings, showing a warning threshold of 5000 and a danger threshold of 15000.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and activation of the Exam Administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a user management page showing the username 'dpo.officer' assigned the role of Exam Administrator (or similar admin role) with an 'active' status indicator.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the SEB Server web interface rather than terminal commands or database queries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SEB Server web UI in a browser (e.g., Firefox/Chrome). There should be no evidence of direct SQL database manipulation or curl/API commands in a terminal to create the entities.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually interacted with the application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show form fields being filled out, dropdowns being selected, or success toast/flash messages within the SEB Server UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not simply write the expected answers into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration names and values must be visible inside the actual SEB Server application, not just typed into a text editor or notes application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected username for the Exam Administrator is 'dpo.officer'. The expected exam configuration name is 'GDPR Compliant Exam Config'. The expected connection configuration name is 'Privacy-First Connection'. The expected template name is 'GDPR Exam Template'. The expected monitoring indicator name is 'Minimal Monitoring'.
